headline: NextEra Energy Trades Above 50 and 200-Day SMA: Is More Upside Ahead?
summary: NEE is trading above its 50 and 200-day SMAs as big clean-energy investments and a growing renewables backlog fuel optimism. Yet valuation looks rich.

headline: Expect Array Technologies To Swing To Profitability Again Amidst Industry Tailwinds
summary: Array Technologies, Inc. looks like a Buy: $2.4B backlog, 2x book-to-bill, 12.7% FCF yield, and solar tailwinds. Click for this ARRY stock update.
